title: Compiler foundation
summary: Establish compiler repository structure, parser/module semantics baseline, and analysis groundwork required for stable AOT and packaging flows.

cutoff.rationale: Compiler Initial Commit (dd75bff, 2026-03-05) through superrepo tag v0.1.0 (f777b79, 2026-04-22): compiler workspace bootstrap, AOT/pack path, file-scoped module semantics, resolver compatibility and analysis hardening, plus required CI/release integration; ends before platform-spec cutover (19745d4) and analysis pipeline split.
